digest.en: US President Trump and Russian President Putin discussed a potential Ukraine ceasefire and the Iran war in a recent call. The conversation came as the US has spent $25 billion on the war with Iran. Israel's plan to relocate the Bnei Menashe community is also making headlines.
digest.hi: मिजोरम में एक परिवार ने अपने बेटे के अंगदान से चार लोगों को नई जिंदगी दी। यह घटना राज्य में मानवता की एक अनोखी मिसाल है। ईरान के विदेश मंत्री ने लेबनान के स्पीकर से मुलाकात कर क्षेत्रीय हालात पर चर्चा की।

articles.title: What’s behind Israel’s plan to move the Bnei Menashe?
articles.summary: Israel's government has introduced a 2026 plan to relocate the Bnei Menashe community from Northeast India. The community has begun arriving in Israel under this plan, marking a significant shift in the community's history.

articles.title: I discussed Ukraine ceasefire on ‘very good’ call with Putin
articles.summary: Former US President Donald Trump claimed he had a 'very good' phone call with Russian President Vladimir Putin to discuss a potential Ukraine ceasefire. Trump: I discussed Ukraine ceasefire on ‘very good’ call with Putin The Telegraph.

articles.title: Iran's highly enriched uranium likely is at the Isfahan site, the UN nuclear chief tells the AP
articles.summary: The UN nuclear chief believes highly enriched uranium is likely stored at Iran's Isfahan site, according to a statement to the AP. Iran's highly enriched uranium likely is at the Isfahan site, the UN nuclear chief tells the AP Dallas News.

articles.title: Trump and Putin discuss Iran war and float temporary Ukraine ceasefire in call
articles.summary: US President Donald Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin discussed a temporary Ukraine ceasefire and the Iran war during a recent phone call. Trump and Putin discuss Iran war and float temporary Ukraine ceasefire in call The Guardian.

articles.title: The Iran war now has a price tag ($25 billion), but still no end date
articles.summary: The US war in Iran has cost an estimated $25 billion over the past two months, according to the Pentagon, but a definitive end date remains unclear. The Pentagon estimates the war has cost $25 billion over the past two months.

articles.title: Trump and Putin Call for a Brief Cease-Fire in Ukraine
articles.summary: Trump and Putin called for a brief cease-fire in Ukraine, though previous truces have broken down amid accusations of violations. Previous truces have broken down amid competing accusations of violations, and it is not clear that Ukraine will agree to Moscow’s terms.

articles.title: US lawmakers question Pete Hegseth over budget for war on Iran
articles.summary: US lawmakers questioned Pete Hegseth over the budget for a war on Iran during his testimony before Congress. US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth testified before Congress on the Pentagon’s budget for the US-Israeli war on Iran.

articles.title: Pentagon chief Hegseth first public hearing on Iran war: Key takeaways
articles.summary: Pete Hegseth testified that the US-Iran war has cost $25bn, responding to questions alongside General Dan Caine. Pete Hegseth testifies alongside General Dan Caine, responds to questions on war Pentagon says has cost $25bn.

articles.title: Iran’s rial currency hits record low as a shaky ceasefire with the US and Israel holds
articles.summary: Iran's rial currency has hit a record low as a shaky ceasefire with the US and Israel holds. The economic strain on Iran is evident in the currency's decline. Iran’s rial currency hits record low as shaky ceasefire with US and Israel holds AP News.

articles.title: US Has Spent $25 Billion So Far In War With Iran: Pentagon Official
articles.summary: The US has spent $25 billion so far in its war with Iran, according to a Pentagon official. The conflict began on February 28 with US strikes against Iranian targets.

articles.title: US Israel Iran War News Live Updates: 'Truce must be fully implemented,' says Lebanon as Israeli
articles.summary: Lebanon called for a truce as Israeli strikes killed 20 in two days. US Israel Iran War News Live Updates: 'Truce must be fully implemented,' says Lebanon as Israeli strikes kill 20 in two days The Times of India.

articles.title: Trump, Putin Discuss Iran War And Ukraine In Over 90-Minute Call
articles.summary: Trump and Putin discussed Iran and Ukraine in a 90-minute call. The presidents "paid particular attention to the situation regarding Iran and in the Persian Gulf". Trump, Putin Discuss Iran War And Ukraine In Over 90-Minute Call.

articles.title: Jaishankar holds talks with Iran's Foreign Minister on West Asia situation
articles.summary: Jaishankar held talks with Iran's Foreign Minister to discuss the West Asia situation and conflict. U. S. Congress will grill Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth on the West Asia conflict on Wednesday.

articles.title: Ukraine Urges Israel To Seize Vessel Carrying Grains 'Stolen' By Russia
articles.summary: Ukraine urged Israel to seize a vessel carrying grain allegedly stolen by Russia from eastern Ukrainian regions. Kyiv has repeatedly protested Russian exports of grain from eastern Ukrainian regions. (File).

articles.title: Stabbing Of 2 Jewish Men In London Declared Terrorist Attack
articles.summary: A stabbing of two Jewish men in London was declared a terrorist attack and condemned by politicians. Politicians condemned the attack. Stabbing Of 2 Jewish Men In London Declared Terrorist Attack.

articles.title: 5 Stones intelligence (5Si)® Expands Leadership Team With Senior Experts From CIA, NSA, and
articles.summary: 5 Stones intelligence expanded its leadership team with senior experts from the CIA, NSA, and Homeland Security. 5 Stones intelligence (5Si)® Expands Leadership Team With Senior Experts From CIA, NSA, and Homeland Security Investigations Business Wire.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Putin Speaks To Trump, They Discuss Iran And Gulf Situation
articles.summary: Putin spoke to Trump about Iran and the Gulf situation. They discussed a potential ceasefire. US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Putin Speaks To Trump, They Discuss Iran And Gulf Situation NDTV.

articles.title: Iran has executed at least 21 people since start of war: UN human rights chief
articles.summary: Iran has executed at least 21 people since the start of the war, according to the UN human rights chief. Iran has executed at least 21 people since start of war: UN human rights chief The Hill.

articles.title: Sports and World Politics - E-International Relations
articles.summary: Sports influence world politics through diplomacy and competition. Nations use sports to build relationships. War Minus the Shooting: Sports and World Politics E-International Relations. Sports and World Politics - E-International Relations.

articles.title: Vietnam’s Evolving Multidirectional Defense Strategy in Response to Regional Competition - The
articles.summary: Vietnam is developing a multidirectional defense strategy in response to regional competition. Vietnam’s Evolving Multidirectional Defense Strategy in Response to Regional Competition The National Bureau of Asian Research (NBR). Vietnam’s Evolving Multidirectional Defense Strategy in Response to Regional Competition - The.

articles.title: Stranded whale ferried out of German waters in barge
articles.summary: A stranded whale was ferried out of German waters in a barge after earlier rescue attempts failed. The final operation to save the whale is being closely followed, after the failure of earlier attempts.

articles.title: डिप्टी सीएम डीके शिवकुमार ने अस्पताल पहुंचकर घायलों से की मुलाकात; भारी बारिश के कारण ढही थी दीवार

articles.summary: पश्चिम बंगाल, असम, केरल और तमिलनाडु में विधानसभा चुनावों के परिणाम जल्द ही घोषित किए जाएंगे। केंद्रीय निर्वाचन आयोग ने बताया कि पश्चिम बंगाल में 91.66% और 93.19% मतदान हुआ था।

articles.title: ईरान की जंग के बीच 'बादलों की चोरी' की अफ़वाहें तेज़, क्या है हक़ीक़त?
articles.summary: ईरान की जंग के बीच 'बादलों की चोरी' की अफ़वाहें तेज़ हो रही हैं। एक पोस्ट में दावा किया गया है कि तुर्की में बारिश हो रही है क्योंकि उनका हवाई क्षेत्र बंद है। इससे अमेरिका 'बादलों की चोरी' नहीं कर पा रहा है।

articles.summary: नासिक टीसीएस मामले में पहली एफ़आईआर दर्ज हुए एक महीना बीत चुका है। इस बीच कुछ सामाजिक संगठन, अभियुक्त के परिजन और वकील मामले से जुड़े कई सवाल उठाने लगे हैं। धर्मांतरण के आरोप और जांच पर सवाल उठ रहे हैं।

articles.title: किम जोंग उन बेटी को अपनी गद्दी के लिए ऐसे कर रहे हैं तैयार
articles.summary: उत्तर कोरिया के नेता किम जोंग उन अपनी बेटी को पश्चिमी शैली के कपड़ों में सार्वजनिक रूप से दिखा रहे हैं, जो उत्तर कोरिया में प्रतिबंधित हैं। यह उनकी विरासत संभालने के लिए तैयार करने का संकेत है। उनकी बेटी की तस्वीरें हाल ही में सामने आई हैं।

articles.title: यूएई का बाहर निकलना ओपेक के लिए कितना बड़ा झटका, दुनिया पर इसका क्या असर होगा?
articles.summary: संयुक्त अरब अमीरात ने ओपेक के उत्पादन कोटा नियमों के कारण अपनी तेल उत्पादन क्षमता को सीमित रखा था। अब वह अपनी क्षमता का बेहतर उपयोग करना चाहता है और इसके लिए ओपेक से बाहर निकलने का फैसला किया है। इससे ओपेक को बड़ा झटका लगा है।
